title: Tender and Government Notice Monitor
description: Starter project for tender notices, deadlines, documents, contacts, and failed URL review.

files.content:
{{project_name}}
Tender monitor starter. Add public/authorized notice URLs to urls.txt. Review robots and scope before crawling.

php bin/mnb-scraper bulk:crawl urls.txt --profile=tender --pipeline --job-dir=storage/{{project_name}} --gap-ms=1500
php bin/mnb-scraper export:failed storage/{{project_name}}/crawl.json --format=csv --output=storage/{{project_name}}/failed.csv
php bin/mnb-scraper report:summary storage/{{project_name}} --format=html --output=storage/{{project_name}}/summary.html
